card.nfcTarget: Freelancer = 40-50% of VN's 5,700 NFC for the year
card.situation: Vietnam launching the Freelancer segment end of May, first time WF treats freelancers as a distinct audience. Big bet on the 'hire freelancers as micro-influencers' playbook (job-offer framing, fixed fee + affiliate link, real users showing $$ comparisons vs PayPal/Pioneer/PingPong). Two-track model: big TikTok KOLs ($500-$1.5K, ~$6 CPM) plus micro-influencer freelancers ($50-$500). Clean competitive lane: PingPong is deprioritizing this segment, Pioneer charges withdrawal fee + 2% to local banks. Plan: test small in June, scale July if it works.
